gt_sql: SELECT T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GPT < 60 ORDER BY T2.GPT DESC LIMIT 3
pred_sql:
SELECT p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GPT < 60
ORDER BY l.GPT DESC
LIMIT 3;
question: Please list the top three patients' birthdays with the highest glutamic pylvic transaminase in the normal range.
